{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Planetary Security (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Planetary [[Security]] is an organization that responds to incidents on planets.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
